topics.japaneseName: A2/N4/J4 connected task 助詞の文脈診断
topics.description: Particle context diagnosis means diagnosing particle choice from case role, topic, focus, contrast, omission, and implied relation. At A2/N4/J4 daily tasks, the learner uses it in short connected messages, requests, schedules, descriptions, or simple workplace confirmations and explains why the form fits the role, channel, time, or task goal.
evidence: Recognize the relevant form, cue, or discourse move in A2/N4/J4 daily tasks.
Use it accurately in short connected messages, requests, schedules, descriptions, or simple workplace confirmations.
Repair or explain one choice by showing why the form fits the role, channel, time, or task goal.
topics.assessmentPrompt: Give the learner a task from A2/N4/J4 daily tasks involving particle context diagnosis; ask them to use it, repair one problem, and explain the form-function choice.
